summary: The diff shows modifications to existing files consistent with a redeploy of the AI Image Studio application. The backend Motoko actor with Hugging Face HTTP outcalls is present, the React frontend components (ImageGenerationForm, Footer) are present with all required fields, and supporting files (frontend-file-summaries.txt, project_state.json) reflect the full application structure. The changes appear to be a straight redeploy without new features or removed functionality.
